Discovery: The 2026 Strait of Hormuz crisis exposed fossil fuel vulnerability across 20% of global oil supply, accelerating government pivots toward nuclear energy security — uranium spot hit $101/lb in January 2026, the US reinstated uranium to its critical minerals list, and IEA forecasts nuclear investment tripling to $210B/year by 2035 with supply deficits widening as Kazakhstan (43% of output) faces production constraints.
value_picks.analyst_take: Nuclear renaissance structural trade: 33 countries COP30 tripling commitment; US critical minerals reclassification; AI hyperscalers signing multi-GW nuclear agreements; 20 Buy / 3 Hold / 0 Sell
